title: Mesh
description: Mesh: A polygon mesh, defined by a list of triangular or quadrilateral Faces and their Vertices.

Vertices.description: Defines the three-dimensional Mesh geometry as  X, Y, Z coordinates.

Faces.description: The list of polygons, defined as corner Point indices referencing the list of Vertices.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
